~/.config/rofi/scripts/launchers/type-7/: bash -c "CLASS=\$(env MANGO_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE=/run/user/\$(id -u)/mango-\$(pgrep -x mango).sock mmsg get focusing-client | jq -r '.appid // empty') && if [ -n \"\$CLASS\" ]; then echo -n \"\$CLASS\" | wl-copy && notify-send -i window_list 'Find Window Class' \"Window class \$CLASS copied to clipboard\"; else notify-send -i window_list 'Find Window Class' 'No focused window found'; fi"
env MANGO_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE=/run/user/\$(id -u)/mango-\$(pgrep -x mango).sock mmsg dispatch reload_config && notify-send -i preferences-desktop "MangoWM" "Successfully reloaded MangoWM"
